columns.description: The date the report was generated
columns.business_meaning: The date the report was generated

columns.name: fnsku
columns.description: Unique identifier that Amazon assigns to products stored in and fulfilled from an Amazon fulfillment center
columns.business_meaning: Unique identifier that Amazon assigns to products stored in and fulfilled from an Amazon fulfillment center

columns.name: asin
columns.description: Unique blocks of 10 letters or numbers that identify items. ASINs are assigned by Amazon. You can find the ASIN on the product detail page.
columns.business_meaning: Unique blocks of 10 letters or numbers that identify items. ASINs are assigned by Amazon. You can find the ASIN on the product detail page.

columns.name: channel_skus
columns.description: The channel_sku associated with this FNSKU, separated by comma if more than one
columns.business_meaning: The channel_sku associated with this FNSKU, separated by comma if more than one

columns.name: event_type
columns.description: Type of event that caused a change in inventory, such as shipment, receipt, vendor return, warehouse transfer, adjustment, or customer return
columns.business_meaning: Type of event that caused a change in inventory, such as shipment, receipt, vendor return, warehouse transfer, adjustment, or customer return

columns.name: reference_id
columns.description: Transaction ID, such as a shipment ID or adjustment ID
columns.business_meaning: Transaction ID, such as a shipment ID or adjustment ID

columns.name: fulfillment_center_id
columns.description: Fulfillment center where the inventory is stored
columns.business_meaning: Fulfillment center where the inventory is stored

columns.name: disposition
columns.description: Status of the product, such as sellable or damaged
columns.business_meaning: Status of the product, such as sellable or damaged

columns.name: reason
columns.description: The downloaded report displays codes, while the online report shows descriptions. View the Adjustment types and reason codes table below for a full list of codes and descriptions.
columns.business_meaning: The downloaded report displays codes, while the online report shows descriptions. View the Adjustment types and reason codes table below for a full list of codes and descriptions.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the inventory is stored
columns.business_meaning: Country where the inventory is stored

columns.name: reconciled_quantity
columns.description: Number of units that have been reconciled with other adjustment events
columns.business_meaning: Number of units that have been reconciled with other adjustment events

columns.description: Number of units that have not been reconciled with other adjustment events
columns.business_meaning: Number of units that have not been reconciled with other adjustment events

columns.description: old channel id from Juvoplus side definition
columns.business_meaning: old channel id from Juvoplus side definition

columns.name: sku
columns.description: Stock Keeping Units (SKUs) are unique blocks of letters or numbers that identify your products.
columns.business_meaning: Stock Keeping Units (SKUs) are unique blocks of letters or numbers that identify your products.

columns.name: fnsku
columns.description: Unique identifier assigned by Amazon to products stored in and fulfilled from an Amazon fulfillment center
columns.business_meaning: Unique identifier assigned by Amazon to products stored in and fulfilled from an Amazon fulfillment center

columns.name: asin
columns.description: Amazon Standard Identification Numbers (ASINs) are unique blocks of 10 letters or numbers that identify items.
columns.business_meaning: Amazon Standard Identification Numbers (ASINs) are unique blocks of 10 letters or numbers that identify items.

columns.name: mfn_listing_exists
columns.description: "Yes" indicates that the product is listed for fulfillment by you as the seller.
columns.business_meaning: "Yes" indicates that the product is listed for fulfillment by you as the seller.

columns.name: mfn_fulfillable_quantity
columns.description: The quantity in your fulfillment network that can be picked, packed, and shipped.
columns.business_meaning: The quantity in your fulfillment network that can be picked, packed, and shipped.

columns.name: afn_listing_exists
columns.description: "Yes" indicates that the item is listed for Fulfillment by Amazon.
columns.business_meaning: "Yes" indicates that the item is listed for Fulfillment by Amazon.

columns.name: afn_warehouse_quantity
columns.description: The number of units you have for an SKU in Amazon fulfillment centers that have been processed: (afn-warehouse-quantity) = (afn-fulfillable-quantity) + (afn-unsellable-quantity) + (afn-reserved-quantity).
columns.business_meaning: The number of units you have for an SKU in Amazon fulfillment centers that have been processed: (afn-warehouse-quantity) = (afn-fulfillable-quantity) + (afn-unsellable-quantity) + (afn-reserved-quantity).

columns.name: afn_fulfillable_quantity
columns.description: The number of units you have for a SKU in Amazon fulfillment centers that can be picked, packed, and shipped.
columns.business_meaning: The number of units you have for a SKU in Amazon fulfillment centers that can be picked, packed, and shipped.

columns.name: afn_unsellable_quantity
columns.description: The number of units you have for a SKU in Amazon fulfillment centers in unsellable condition.
columns.business_meaning: The number of units you have for a SKU in Amazon fulfillment centers in unsellable condition.

columns.name: afn_reserved_quantity
columns.description: The number of units you have for a SKU in Amazon fulfillment centers that are currently being picked, packed, and shipped or are sidelined for measurement, sampling, or other internal processes.
columns.business_meaning: The number of units you have for a SKU in Amazon fulfillment centers that are currently being picked, packed, and shipped or are sidelined for measurement, sampling, or other internal processes.

columns.name: afn_total_quantity
columns.description: The total number of units you have for a SKU in an inbound shipment or in Amazon fulfillment centers: (afn-total-quantity) = (afn-warehouse-quantity) + (afn-inbound-working-quantity) + (afn-inbound-shipped-quantity) + (afn-inbound-receiving-quantity)
columns.business_meaning: The total number of units you have for a SKU in an inbound shipment or in Amazon fulfillment centers: (afn-total-quantity) = (afn-warehouse-quantity) + (afn-inbound-working-quantity) + (afn-inbound-shipped-quantity) + (afn-inbound-receiving-quantity)

columns.name: per_unit_volume
columns.description: The volume in cubic feet of one unit (to the nearest 1/100 of an inch).
columns.business_meaning: The volume in cubic feet of one unit (to the nearest 1/100 of an inch).

columns.name: afn_inbound_working_quantity
columns.description: The number of units you have for a SKU in an inbound shipment that you have notified Amazon about.
columns.business_meaning: The number of units you have for a SKU in an inbound shipment that you have notified Amazon about.

columns.name: afn_inbound_shipped_quantity
columns.description: The number of units you have for a SKU in an inbound shipment that you have notified Amazon about and provided a tracking number.
columns.business_meaning: The number of units you have for a SKU in an inbound shipment that you have notified Amazon about and provided a tracking number.

columns.name: afn_inbound_receiving_quantity
columns.description: The number of units you have for a SKU that have not yet been received at an Amazon fulfillment center for processing, but are part of an inbound shipment with some units that have already been received and processed.
columns.business_meaning: The number of units you have for a SKU that have not yet been received at an Amazon fulfillment center for processing, but are part of an inbound shipment with some units that have already been received and processed.

columns.name: afn_researching_quantity
columns.description: The goods have been put into the wrong warehouse or damaged. We are investigating now. We will finish the investigation and adjust the inventory data within 30 days
columns.business_meaning: The goods have been put into the wrong warehouse or damaged. We are investigating now. We will finish the investigation and adjust the inventory data within 30 days

columns.name: afn_reserved_future_supply
columns.description: The number of units that customers have purchased while inventory is on its way to an Amazon fulfillment center through In-Stock Head Start.
columns.business_meaning: The number of units that customers have purchased while inventory is on its way to an Amazon fulfillment center through In-Stock Head Start.

columns.name: afn_future_supply_buyable
columns.description: The number of units available for customers to find and buy while inventory is on its way to an Amazon fulfillment center through In-Stock Head Start.
columns.business_meaning: The number of units available for customers to find and buy while inventory is on its way to an Amazon fulfillment center through In-Stock Head Start.
